title: E2E integration tests + benchmarks + examples
description:
Implement all end-to-end integration tests, performance benchmarks with hard thresholds, and example applications.

Integration tests:
- tests/integration/inference_e2e.rs: Load Qwen3-0.6B from safetensors, generate 50 tokens greedy, verify coherent output (top-1 agreement >= 95% with HF reference)
- tests/integration/quantization_accuracy.rs: INT8 vs f32 logits comparison, top-1 agreement >= 99%
- tests/integration/kvcache_correctness.rs: cached vs uncached output bit-exact
- tests/integration/config_driven_assembly.rs: Qwen3 + LLaMA configs build different architectures from same engine, assembly <= 2 sec

Benchmarks (HARD thresholds):
- tests/benchmarks/prefill_throughput.rs: >= 500 tok/s Qwen3 f32
- tests/benchmarks/inference_throughput.rs: >= 20 tok/s decode f32, >= 35 tok/s INT8
- tests/benchmarks/quantization_speedup.rs: INT8 vs f32 throughput
- tests/benchmarks/memory_usage.rs: <= 3GB f32, <= 1.5GB INT8
Use cfg!(debug_assertions) for ~5x lower debug thresholds.

Examples:
- examples/qwen3_chat.rs: Interactive chat with Qwen3-0.6B
- examples/model_benchmark.rs: Benchmark any model via config

Verify ALL existing Phase 1+2 tests still pass (no regressions).

Pass/fail:
- All integration tests pass
- All benchmark thresholds met
- Examples compile and run
- No Phase 1+2 regressions
